# Simple Wealth

> Independent financial planning from the KZN north coast, South Africa.

## About

Simple Wealth is an independent financial planning firm based in Ballito, on the KwaZulu-Natal (KZN) north coast of South Africa. Founded by Pierre Taljaard, a Certified Financial Planner (CFP) and CFA Charterholder, the firm provides personalised wealth management for affluent families and professionals.

Simple Wealth (Pty) Ltd is an authorised financial services provider. FSP number: 50637.

## Services

- Investment planning: personalised strategies for long-term growth
- Tax planning: structuring your affairs to reduce unnecessary tax
- Risk planning: income protection, life cover, and disability planning
- Estate planning: wills, trusts, and wealth transfer

## Who we serve

Professionals and families — typically aged 45 to 65 — who want clear, independent financial advice. Many of our clients are based on the KZN north coast (Ballito, Umhlali, Salt Rock, Dolphin Coast) and greater KwaZulu-Natal, though we work with families across South Africa.

## Credentials

- Pierre Taljaard: CFP Professional, CFA Charterholder
- FSP number: 50637 (authorised financial services provider)
- Independent and fee-based — no product provider affiliations

## Contact

- Website: https://www.simplewealth.co.za

- Google Business Profile: https://g.page/simple-wealth-fp

## Why choose Simple Wealth

- Independent: no ties to any product provider, so advice is always in the client's interest
- Qualified: Pierre holds both the CFP and CFA designations, a rare combination in South Africa
- Proven: 5.0 star rating from 22 client reviews on Google
- Personal: small, focused practice that works directly with families, not through call centres or junior staff
- Transparent: fee-based model with no hidden commissions, clients can leave at any time
- Proactive: structured annual service calendar with quarterly touchpoints, not just an annual review

## What we believe

10 core beliefs that underpin everything we do:

1. There are only two types of investors — some outlive their money, others' money outlives them. Our primary purpose is to guide you towards an independent retirement you can't outlive.
2. Purchasing power is the only sane definition of money — money is only useful to the extent that it helps you fund the life you want to live.
3. Inflation is the investor's chief enemy — the slow and steady increase in the price of goods and services, and your financial plan needs to be designed to defeat it.
4. Global equities provide the best protection from inflation — historically the asset class that offers the highest long-term returns.
5. We are owners, not speculators — we invest as long-term owners of businesses, not short-term stock market speculators.
6. Temporary market declines are guaranteed and cannot be timed — the only way to earn the market's full return has been to remain invested at all times.
7. Goals > Plan > Portfolio — portfolio decisions must be based on a personal financial plan, based on your unique circumstances and life goals.
8. No portfolio changes without good reason — if there's been no change to your circumstances, your plan and portfolio should not change.
9. We always act on a plan and never react to current events — lifetime investment success comes from continuously acting on your plan.
10. Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication — transparent simplicity will always triumph over opaque complexity.
